mission: Drive every product bot toward fully coded, locally testable, Buddy-routable operation as fast as possible.

policy.asap_rule: Fix highest-priority product bots first, regenerate coverage, rerun smoke checks, then repeat until incomplete count is zero.
policy.paid_or_live_actions: approval-gated even after bot code is complete
